chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5191 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.22922/2024 2. For hearing of main case 22.05.2025 Petitioner is present in person Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Petitioner states that the petition is pressed to the extent that application dated 30.09.2024, addressed to Commissioner Karachi (Respondent No.3), available at page 51, may be decided expeditiously (preferably within one week) vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner / applicant. Learned AAG articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
